name: Team Lipinski
subject: Sign the card!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for CongressContributions or gifts to Dan Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible
body:
http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/ [http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/]
Hi there Peter,
As you know, our state had a change of leadership on November 6th, and today, J.B. Pritzker was inaugurated as the 43rd governor of Illinois.
Gov. Pritzker has already demonstrated his dedication to supporting everyday families by creating his “Restoring Illinois’ Infrastructure Committee” (and appointing Dan to co-chair it!).
Add your name to sign a congratulations card for Gov. Pritzker → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Pp3DZag-PUSBdnbesvv8lw2?emci=e4f64a85-3218-e911-9f2a-281878391efb&emdi=e71cee75-4118-e911-9f2a-281878391efb&ceid=2478574&contactdata=%2B1ZPl%2FaDv04OmKzm83bNVBTwRWKvCgXU3OQGu0gEjooiZh0KGXDPfEtvm4Kdl1r2z%2F46y1uDwvl373Eqhkk5FLvHHjX4COyi8vb6O%2F2FOZ4%2FDjIziHS72ZQwSeJMdxrp]
Congratulate the new governor [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Pp3DZag-PUSBdnbesvv8lw2?emci=e4f64a85-3218-e911-9f2a-281878391efb&emdi=e71cee75-4118-e911-9f2a-281878391efb&ceid=2478574&contactdata=%2B1ZPl%2FaDv04OmKzm83bNVBTwRWKvCgXU3OQGu0gEjooiZh0KGXDPfEtvm4Kdl1r2z%2F46y1uDwvl373Eqhkk5FLvHHjX4COyi8vb6O%2F2FOZ4%2FDjIziHS72ZQwSeJMdxrp]
New leadership is a brand new opportunity to recalibrate our government and ensure its doing everything it can to look out for working families. We wish the new governor the best, and look forward to working with him!
Add your name to Gov. Pritzker’s congratulations card → [http://secure.ngpvan.com/Pp3DZag-PUSBdnbesvv8lw2?emci=e4f64a85-3218-e911-9f2a-281878391efb&emdi=e71cee75-4118-e911-9f2a-281878391efb&ceid=2478574&contactdata=%2B1ZPl%2FaDv04OmKzm83bNVBTwRWKvCgXU3OQGu0gEjooiZh0KGXDPfEtvm4Kdl1r2z%2F46y1uDwvl373Eqhkk5FLvHHjX4COyi8vb6O%2F2FOZ4%2FDjIziHS72ZQwSeJMdxrp]
Thanks,
— Everyone on Team Lipinski

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Your thoughts on the National Climate Assessment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hello,

The day after Thanksgiving -- when they thought most people wouldn't be paying attention -- the Administration released the National Climate Assessment.

And it confirmed what many of us already knew: Global warming is not only behind recent extreme weather, like wildfires and droughts, but it could lead to even worse disasters, not to mention huge costs to our environment, our health, and our economy.

The President quickly announced that he disagrees with the Assessment's findings, but his Administration can't hide the truth. And _we_ can't hide from the hard work it will take to take on the climate crisis.

I want to know what you think. [**Will you take my short survey on the National Climate Assessment and the actions we must take to combat climate change?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=wVSAfcY8ahC2iX%2FtSqHwses%2F404JJ3wU)

\-- Amy
[**Contribute**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=GKCOStEUq2DSvir9UeT4res%2F404JJ3wU)
---

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo
subject: The inauguration of Brian Kemp
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
There is no better time to work for free and fair elections |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa664/34a064cc/4aa32b4/70c6742/3255692665/VEsH/ "https://www.fairfightgeorgia.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=IE190114Inaug&source=IE190114Inaug")

| | | Friend, The right to vote - to participate in the democratic process - is our most fundamental right as Americans. But this past election, too many people were disenfranchised, whether by law or by gross incompetence or intentional suppression. From hours-long lines, to database issues related to registration, to precincts running out of provisional ballots on Election Day, countless voters faced undue burdens when attempting to cast their ballots. **But we do not concede that the forces of suppression are greater than the voices of the millions of people who want to be heard.** [**Brian Kemp is being inaugurated today as Georgia's next Governor, which is exactly why there is no better moment, and no better time, to work for free and fair elections. Can you join us?**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa664/34a064cc/4aa32b4/70c6743/3255692665/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fair-fight-1?refcode=IE011419Inaug&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=2+-+Brian+Kemp+is+being+inaugurated+today+as&utm_campaign=IE190114Inaug&source=IE190114Inaug")**[Chip in $5 to help.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa664/34a064cc/4aa32b4/70c6740/3255692665/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fair-fight-1?refcode=IE011419Inaug&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+5+to+help&utm_campaign=IE190114Inaug&source=IE190114Inaug")** Americans are hungry for change. We know that we have reached a watershed moment for voting rights, and that how we react now will determine the strength of our democracy for years to come. Fair Fight's first step was to file a federal lawsuit to ask the courts to enact broad, bold, sweeping election reform in the state of Georgia. And in the coming months, Fair Fight will be working to organize progressive leaders, work with grassroots organizers, and encourage voters to fight for, and to demand, a free and fair democracy. [**We don 't have a moment to lose. If we're going to hold this administration accountable and ensure that future elections are the will of the people, we need to step up right now to prepare for the fight ahead. Chip in now.**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa664/34a064cc/4aa32b4/70c6741/3255692665/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fair-fight-1?refcode=IE011419Inaug&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=4+-+We+donrsquot+have+a+moment+to+lose+If+we&utm_campaign=IE190114Inaug&source=IE190114Inaug") Thanks for being with us in the fight, Lauren Groh-Wargo

---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa664/34a064cc/4aa32b4/70c674e/3255692665/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fair-fight-1?refcode=IE011419Inaug&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=5+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=IE190114Inaug&source=IE190114Inaug")**
